name: Wave Systems Corp.
summary: Hardware-based digital security company. Founding member of Trusted Computing Platform Alliance (TCPA, 1999) and its successor the Trusted Computing Group (TCG, 2003). Developed EMBASSY platform for TPM chip management. Permanent TCG board member alongside AMD, HP, IBM, Intel, Lenovo, Microsoft, Oracle. Software shipped on 500M+ PCs via Dell, Acer, HP, Lenovo. Peak market cap exceeded $1.8B in March 2000. CEO Steven Sprague served 14 years as principal industry evangelist for trusted computing.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
